explanations.1: This XML file is for customizing the Office ribbon interface—the toolbar at the top of Word, Excel, etc.
explanations.4: The insertAfterMso='TabView' attribute means this custom tab will appear right after the built-in View tab in the ribbon.
explanations.9: imageMso='HappyFace' references a built-in Office icon by name rather than providing your own image file.
explanations.11: onAction='OnButtonClicked' is the name of a VBA or macro function that will run when someone clicks this button.
explanations.15: onChange='OnEditBoxTextChanged' is the function name that gets called whenever a user types something in this text box.
